channel.title: Manifold Learning on SR's Website
channel.description: Recent content in Manifold Learning on SR's Website

item.title: Intuitive Introduction to Differential Geometry
item.description: In this post I talk about some interesting ways to expand the view of Euclidean or Co-ordinate geometry, by introducing the notion of Differential Geometry.

item.title: t-SNE: A way to Visualize Multidimensional Dataset
item.description: This post is regarding a presentation that I gave associated with D. Basu memorial lecture series.
